title: Tangerine Harvest
description: Pick tangerines (gamgyul) alongside a farming family during peak harvest season, on a real working orchard.
local_story: Citrus farming has shaped Jeju's rural economy since the mid-20th century, and the winter harvest remains the most demanding and important stretch of many farming families' year.
source_note: This is MVP experience-card data connected to JEJU-KB. It is not a real commercial product listing.
